final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a dynamic basketball dunk scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 热血动漫 (hot-blooded anime) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include dynamic motion blur conveying speed and impact
Subject: must include a basketball player mid-air performing a slam dunk, sweat droplets flying
Scene/backdrop: must include a basketball court with cheering crowd and camera flashes in background
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy, passionate atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
